pass1_quick_scan.goal: Understand the problem and proposed solution

steps.objective: Understand the research context and main contributions
questions_to_answer: What sequence modeling and transduction problems does the paper address?
What is the main limitation of recurrent models?
What is the proposed Transformer model?
steps.expected_output: Understand the research context and main contributions

questions_to_answer: What are the limitations of recurrent neural networks?
How do attention mechanisms help in sequence modeling?

steps.objective: Get an overview of the results
questions_to_answer: What are the main results of the paper?
How does the Transformer model perform compared to other models?
steps.expected_output: Get an overview of the results

pass2_method_understanding.goal: Understand the methodology and evaluation setup

questions_to_answer: What are the main components of the Transformer model?
How does the self-attention mechanism work?
Why is self-attention used in the Transformer model?
What are the benefits of self-attention?
How was the Transformer model trained?
What datasets were used for training and evaluation?

pass3_deep_analysis.goal: Critical analysis of the methodology and results

steps.objective: Analyze the results and evaluation metrics
questions_to_answer: What are the main results of the paper?
How does the Transformer model perform compared to other models?
steps.expected_output: Analyze the results and evaluation metrics

steps.objective: Understand the conclusions and future work
questions_to_answer: What are the main conclusions of the paper?
steps.expected_output: Understand the conclusions and future work

questions_to_answer: What are the strengths and weaknesses of the paper?
What are the implications of the results?

reflection_questions: What are the main contributions of the paper?
What are the implications of the results?
What are the limitations of the paper?
